purpose: Freeze a non-fitted representation holonomy feature layer separating charged leptons, down-type quarks, and up-type quarks after chiral transition validation.

features.hypercharge_jump: absolute change in hypercharge across the allowed left-right transition
features.selector_abs: absolute hypercharge magnitude of the Higgs orientation selector
features.weak_flip: absolute weak isospin component involved in the chiral bridge
features.charge_sq: square of electric charge, used as a phase-sector invariant, not as mass input
features.color_depth_log: logarithmic color multiplicity depth; zero for leptons, log(3) for quarks
features.higgs_conjugation_bit: separates up-type conjugate Higgs bridge from ordinary Higgs bridge

candidate_action_form: rep_action_unit_candidate = positive_part(hypercharge_jump + selector_abs + weak_flip + charge_sq - color_coherence - 0.5*higgs_conjugation_bit)
